actions.title: Attribution & reporting workshop
actions.why: Align lifecycle stages, define conversion events, and build CRM-connected reporting to measure pipeline impact.

actions.title: Tracking & tag governance audit
actions.why: Reduce duplicate tags, standardize UTMs, and improve data quality for cleaner reporting.

actions.title: Website & CMS migration assessment
actions.why: Evaluate migration scope, module needs, and opportunities to consolidate site + lead capture into HubSpot.

actions.title: Conversion path optimization
actions.why: Review CTAs, forms, landing pages, and routing to improve conversion rate and lead quality.

actions.title: Support workflow design session
actions.why: Design ticket pipelines, SLAs, routing, and inbox workflows tied to CRM context.

actions.title: RevOps audit & lifecycle alignment
actions.why: Align properties, lifecycle stages, pipelines, and automation so teams operate from one system.

actions.title: CRM migration / cleanup plan
actions.why: Assess mappings, deduplication, and workflow impacts to reduce migration risk.

always.title: Stack consolidation roadmap
always.why: Identify overlapping tools and define a phased plan to consolidate into HubSpot where it improves operations.
